title: astragalus keratensis
intro: Astragalus keratensis, also known as Astragalus membranaceus, is a type of plant that belongs to the legume family and is native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus keratensis include reducing stress and fatigue, boosting the immune system, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus keratensis can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and prevent illnesses.
